approval.summary: Belt fits Jack's waist cleanly in full-body composite. Buckle aligned with shirt/tie centerline. Scale correct via jacket-width ratio. CoPainter max-alpha~254 quirk reviewed and accepted visually — no halo or seam at belt edges in composite.

source.donor_status: DONOR_ONLY — extracted from CoPainter ZIP; full ZIP set is not the master design

asset_format.max_alpha_note: CoPainter never produces alpha=255 across the ZIP; max observed is ~254. Pixel content preserved as-is (no alpha thresholding). Visually clean in composite — no halo or fringe at belt edges.

copainter_origin_metadata.note: CoPainter ZIP ships loose bbox-cropped PNGs with no per-layer origin/offset metadata. Anchor below was derived manually using See-through layer geometry as the reference frame.

anchor.scale_basis: CoPainter jacket width 269px maps to See-through topwear width 191px

naming_convention.rule: single addressable belt layer for the front-facing puppet

do_not: modify pixel content (byte-identical copy from staging, preserved from CoPainter source)
rename to anything other than jack_belt.png without a fresh QC pass
rebake the alpha to force 255 — keep CoPainter's native semi-alpha edges
promote any other CoPainter layer (jacket/shirt/eyes/etc.) without a fresh staging+composite-QC pass per category
start PSD assembly from this manifest
